title: ⛏ Mineral Delight • [Port]
description: Infuse your meals with gem-powered effects! Mineral Delight adds recipes with minerals and gems, each unlocking unique bonuses. Discover them as you cook! 💎
body:
# Take note!
_This is an official port of the original mod, which we posted with the approval of the developer. All rights reserved. Special thanks to Bluemoon8377 for the incredible work on the original mod! For more details and access to the developer's official social media, check out the original mod page and profile:_
> - [Bluemoon8377 Profile](https://www.curseforge.com/members/bluemoon8377)
> - [Original Mineral Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mineral-delight) 

_This port of the mod will be updated to match the updates of the original mod, starting with the newest versions._
# Description:
Mineral Delight is an exciting <font color="#cdbfce">**Farmers Delight Add-on**</font> that introduces a new way to use minerals and gems in cooking! ✨ This mod adds a variety of new food recipes, each crafted using resources from the Overworld, Nether, and End. These foods provide unique effects that enhance gameplay, including:
- <font color="#d363ff">**Amethyst**</font> dishes that grant the <font color="#d363ff">Brilliance</font> effect for extra experience on critical hits.
- <font color="#ffd063">**Gold**</font> dishes that give <font color="#ffd063">Absorption</font> to heal when consumed.
- <font color="#63e6ff">**Diamond**</font>-based recipes with the <font color="#63e6ff">Noble</font> effect to increase health regeneration.
- <font color="#fd6e66">**Redstone**</font> dishes that provide the <font color="#fd6e66">Signalized</font> effect for stronger signals and more.
- Plus, <font color="#cdbfce">**Stone**</font> dishes that give <font color="#cdbfce">Resistance</font> to damage!
